Describe the sequence of actions taken to decorate the cupcakes shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a hand holds a finished cupcake with pink and green frosting; at 6s, a hand with silver nail polish begins piping pink frosting onto plain yellow cupcakes; at 8s, the hand swirls pink frosting onto the top left cupcake; at 18s, a hand pipes frosting onto the third cupcake while two others are completed.

question: Describe how the arrangement and state of the cupcakes change from the beginning to the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, decorated cupcakes with candy eggs are displayed on a dark surface; at 6s, twelve plain yellow cupcakes appear in rows; at 8s, pink frosting is applied to the first cupcake; at 18s, three cupcakes have pink swirls while nine remain plain.
